api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.subtitle: Downstream access keys for your clients
api_keys.select: Select a key to autofill code below
api_keys.name: Name
api_keys.copy_warning: Keep this key confidential. Do not share it publicly or commit it to version control.
api_keys.allowed_models_hint: Leave empty to allow all models.
api_keys.allowed_ips_hint: Leave empty to allow any IP address.
api_keys.quota_hint: Maximum spending in credits (USD). Key stops working once exceeded.
api_keys.promo_desc: All models, all providers, auto-routed. Self-use is 100% free — unlike <OpenRouterLink>OpenRouter's 5%</OpenRouterLink>.

credentials.title: Bring Your Own Key
credentials.subtitle: Manage your upstream provider credentials
credentials.promo_title: 💰 Got unused capacity? Cash it in.
credentials.promo_desc: Shared credentials earn you universal credits — one wallet, all models, lower prices.
credentials.price_multiplier_helper: At {{ratio}}x multiplier, for every $1.00 of upstream API cost, requests will deduct ${{credited}} Credits.
credentials.hint_json_detected: JSON detected — token will be auto-extracted
credentials.hint_access_token: This looks like a temporary access token (expires in ~1 hour). Please use the refresh token instead.
credentials.error_quota_required: This provider requires a manual quota value. Please enter the remaining balance.
credentials.error_secret_format: The credential format doesn't match the expected pattern ({{example}}). Please double-check.
credentials.copy_prompt_tooltip: Click to copy a prompt you can paste into your AI IDE or CLI tool to extract the credential automatically.

copy_prompt_text.gemini-cli:
I need to extract my Gemini CLI refresh token from this machine.

1. Read the file: ~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json
2. Extract ONLY the "refresh_token" field value
3. Display the refresh_token value so I can copy it

Security: Do NOT display the full file contents or any "access_token" values — only the refresh_token. The refresh_token typically starts with "1//".
copy_prompt_text.antigravity:
I need to extract my Antigravity IDE refresh token from this machine.

1. Find and read JSON files in: ~/.antigravity_tools/accounts/
2. Extract the nested "token.refresh_token" field value
3. Display the refresh_token value so I can copy it

Security: Do NOT display the full file contents or any access token values — only the refresh_token. The refresh_token typically starts with "1//".
copy_prompt_text.kiro:
I need to extract my Kiro IDE refresh token from this machine.

1. Read the file: ~/.aws/sso/cache/kiro-auth-token.json
2. Extract ONLY the "refreshToken" field value (camelCase, NOT "accessToken")
3. Display the refreshToken value so I can copy it

Security: Do NOT display the full file contents or any "accessToken" values — only the refreshToken. The refreshToken typically starts with "aor".

openrouter: Click "Create" to generate a new API key and copy it
zenmux: Click "Create API Key" and copy it
deepinfra: Click "New API Key" and copy it
deepseek: Create a new API key and copy it
google-ai-studio: Create a new API key and copy it
oaipro: Create a new API key and copy it
openai: Create a new secret key and copy it
qwen-code: Click "获取 Coding Plan API Key" to get the plan-exclusive API key and copy it
gemini-cli: Install Gemini CLI and run `gemini` to sign in with Google
Paste the file contents or just the refresh_token value
antigravity: Open Antigravity IDE and sign in with Google
Use the first command below to find your credential filename
Replace <filename> in the second command and run it
Paste the file contents or just the refresh_token value
kiro: Install Kiro IDE and sign in with GitHub or Google
Paste the file contents or just the refreshToken value
moonshot: Create a new API key and copy it
anthropic: Create a new API key and copy it
keyaos: Go to the API Keys page on another Keyaos account
Create an API key and copy it
accio: Log into the Accio app. Once authorized, click Log Out in the app.
Click Log In in the app again. The browser will say 'You have signed into an existing account'.
Press F12 to open Developer Tools and select the Network tab.
Select any network request, scroll down to Request Headers, and find the Cookie field.
Copy the entire Cookie string and paste it below.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Model pricing synced from upstream providers
models.name: Display Name
models.code_intro_standard: Keyaos provides an OpenAI-compatible API. Use any standard SDK — just point it to our base URL and start building.
models.code_intro_reasoning: This model supports chain-of-thought reasoning. Enable the reasoning parameter to access the model's step-by-step thinking process alongside the final answer.
models.code_intro_image: This model supports image generation. Set modalities to ["image", "text"] to receive generated images as base64 data URLs in the response.
models.code_intro_embedding: Keyaos provides an OpenAI-compatible embeddings API. Pass a single string or an array of strings to get vector representations. Supports batch processing for multiple inputs in one request.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Upstream provider pricing and transaction trends

logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Detailed API request logs — showing earnings from shared keys and costs from API calls
logs.promo_desc: We show your request metadata here for transparency. But your actual prompts and completions are never logged, stored, or visible to us. <GithubLink>Audit our 100% source-available engine on GitHub</GithubLink>.

credits.title: Credits
credits.subtitle: Purchase credits and view your transaction history
credits.promo_desc: We absorb all payment processing fees. Unlike the <OpenRouterLink>5.5% fee charged by OpenRouter</OpenRouterLink>, when you buy $10.00 here, you get exactly 10.00 Credits. No markup, no hidden costs.
credits.faq_credits_run_out: What happens when credits run out?
credits.auto_topup_desc: Automatically add credits when your balance drops below a threshold.
credits.auto_topup_no_card: Complete a manual payment first to save your card.
credits.redeem_desc: Enter a gift card code to add credits instantly.

landing.hero_title: The AI Gateway That Routes Smarter
landing.hero_subtitle: One endpoint, every provider. Keyaos automatically finds the cheapest route for each request — so you never overpay for AI.
landing.how_subtitle: Three steps to smarter AI spending
landing.step1_desc: Import API keys from any supported provider — OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Google AI, OpenAI, and more.
landing.step2_desc: Our engine compares every provider in real time and picks the cheapest healthy key for each request.
landing.step3_desc: Drop-in compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs. Change one line — the base URL — and you're done.
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to manage, optimize, and scale your AI infrastructure.
landing.feat_routing_desc: Every request is dispatched to the lowest-cost provider. Health-aware failover handles the rest.
landing.feat_protocol_desc: Native OpenAI and Anthropic Messages API. Transparent protocol conversion under the hood.
landing.feat_sharing_desc: Share idle API keys and earn credits when others route through them. Build a passive income stream.
landing.feat_streaming_desc: SSE responses flow from upstream to client with zero buffering. No gateway overhead.
landing.feat_opensource_desc: BSL licensed, every line of code published on GitHub. Inspect it, fork it, self-host it. No black boxes, no vendor lock-in.
landing.feat_edge_desc: Built on Cloudflare Workers + D1. Deploys globally with sub-millisecond cold starts.
landing.code_subtitle: Switch in seconds. Save from day one.
landing.cta_final_subtitle: Join the open network. Route smarter. Spend less.
